hero.title: WhatsApp Mockup Builder
hero.subtitle: Create realistic WhatsApp iPhone conversations and export them as screenshots or animated videos.
hero.videoUnsupported: Video export is not supported in this browser.
hero.videoFailed: Video export failed. Check the console for details.
hero.mp4Disabled: MP4 conversion is disabled on hosted deployments. Self-host with a local ffmpeg binary to make MP4 export available.
hero.mp4LocalEnabled: MP4 export is enabled on localhost because the app can use a local ffmpeg binary for conversion.

scene.title: Scene Settings
scene.subtitle: Control the top bar, contact details, and wallpaper.
scene.name: Name

composer.title: Composer
composer.subtitle: Add text or image messages exactly in the order they should appear.
composer.quickTextPlaceholder: Type a base message then adjust each bubble below

footer.disclaimer: This tool is for marketing and demonstration purposes only. Generated conversations are fictional and do not represent real communications.

howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.subtitle: Create professional WhatsApp mockups in 4 simple steps.

steps.title: Configure the Scene
steps.description: Set the clock, date, header status, participant names, and choose a wallpaper.

steps.title: Add Messages
steps.description: Use the composer to add text and image messages. Choose the sender and reorder as needed.

steps.title: Customize
steps.description: Upload custom avatars, adjust each bubble's text, and set message timestamps.

steps.title: Export as PNG
steps.description: Click the Export PNG button to download your mockup as a high-quality image ready to use.

initialMessages.text: Hi, I saw your ad on Instagram. Do you ship to NYC?
Yes, we ship nationwide. We have express delivery in NYC today.
I like it. How much is it in sand color?
